rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent Glenn Lerners Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set 2 (Motion #1)
rulings.Rulings: Motion continued to 9/12/2013 at 2:00 p.m. Parties to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Local Rule 14.10(A)(2) by providing endorsed filed copies of all moving and responding papers to Room 202 by 9/5/13. The court has an endorsed filed copy of Mr. McFarland's Reply Declaration filed 8/27/13.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE THE MATTER OF THE GLENN AND ELSA LERNER TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent Glenn A Lerners Notice Of Motion And Motion For Discovery Protective Order
rulings.Rulings: Glenn Lerner's Motion for a Protective Order is denied. Prevailing party to prepare order. Any party who objects to the tentative and wishes to argue the matter must contact the court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel no later than 5:00 p.m. on 9/3/2013.
